episode_text:
day=1; meal=general tso's chicken and broccoli; setting=Social with person in Front; time_of_day=noon;
preferences: microwave_time=1 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize front occlusion; robot_speed=fast; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=LED; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=LED; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; retract_between_bites=no; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes a social partner in front of the user AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip relevance THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose front-occlusion minimization in a front-social context, indicating sensitivity to blocking a person directly ahead.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE the user cannot lean forward due to lack of trunk control, so outside-mouth transfer is not physically compatible.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN not applicable BECAUSE the user's physical abilities support inside-mouth transfer rather than outside-mouth transfer.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes a social partner in front of the user AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip relevance THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user explicitly selected a low-effort automated initiation method in that context. Also, button use is physically incompatible because the user cannot press physical buttons.

IF dining context includes a social partner in front of the user AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip relevance THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user explicitly selected automated initiation for drinking in the observed context. Also, button use is physically incompatible because the user cannot press physical buttons.

IF dining context includes a social partner in front of the user AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip relevance THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user explicitly selected automated initiation for mouth wiping in the observed context. Also, button use is physically incompatible because the user cannot press physical buttons.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes a social partner in front of the user AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip relevance THEN perception BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred reliable automatic detection for bite completion. Button use is physically incompatible.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes a social partner in front of the user AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip relevance THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user explicitly selected automated completion for drinking in the observed context. Button use is physically incompatible.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes a social partner in front of the user AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip relevance THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user explicitly selected automated completion for mouth wiping in the observed context. Button use is physically incompatible.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food has no sauces or dips AND any dining context AND any affective state THEN do not dip BECAUSE dipping is not relevant and the user selected no dipping in the observed meal.
